next_step.current_state: All eight listed finance records were OCR-structured with schema-compliant YAML frontmatter while preserving original note bodies. Per inbox workflow, now delete the processed inbox request.
Task complete: processed next inbox item, updated all eight finance notes, and deleted the inbox file. Need final completion report with only files actually read cited.

function.message: Processed the next inbound note by OCR-structuring the eight listed finance records with YAML frontmatter that matches the finance schema, while preserving each original note body. Then deleted the processed inbox note.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed root and nested AGENTS.MD files, inspected 99_system before task work, used process-next-inbox-item plus OCR and migrate-to-frontmatter workflows, applied the finance schema exactly, preserved original note bodies, and deleted the inbox file only after completing the request.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request at 00_inbox/000_next-task.md explicitly asked to run eight specified finance documents through the OCR workflow. The workflow docs define OCR here as extracting visible note data into YAML frontmatter according to the relevant schema, and each listed invoice/bill note contained all required visible fields and line items needed by the finance schema. I updated those files in place and then deleted the processed inbox item as required by the inbox workflow.
